jobs.basic_qualifications:
- 5+ years of technical product or program management experience
- 7+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
- 3+ years of software development experience
- 5+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
- Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
jobs.description:
Interested in working with the latest technology in the cloud computing space to impact millions of people? The Joining Amazon Technology team is building innovative solutions to revolutionize the way we onboard 2.8 million Amazon new workers a year in over 60 countries. We do not depend on third party monolithic HR systems. Our software uses Amazon Web Services to intelligently work through the complexity of country and role differences, and ensure new hires start successfully on Day 1 with delightful onboarding experiences. We enable all Amazon business' success to onboard new workers to meet dynamic business and market demands, and country and region holiday and prime day retail lifecycle spikes. Our mission is clear: We seek to be the most technically proficient HR organization in the world. Our organization uniquely combines the highest standards of technology – architecture, scalability, reliability and performance with Amazon’s desire to be Earth’s Best Employer.

The Personal Information and Identity Management teams own personal information for all Amazon employees, collected prior to Day 1 and updated throughout employment. We own identity management, including duplicate profile checks, merges and rehire eligibility, and critical integrations with security services for account creation. This year we will expand to support family and dependents. We own STeam and VP level goals with dependencies across 15+ teams.

Key job responsibilities
- Invent and bring new technology solutions to life. Take new ideas from concept to delivery and production launch with dependencies spanning 10+ organizations.
- Own end to end delivery. Apply project management and Agile methodology skills to track program delivery. Drive stakeholders and teams to decisions in ambiguous situations, including resource negotiation and priority alignment. Own communication to senior leadership. Make tradeoff decisions with the cross-functional teams to balance short-term and long-term needs, unblock development and increase delivery speed, and escalate issues effectively to find paths forward when teams are blocked. Analyze risks, develop mitigation strategies and proactively identify and resolve issues.
- Guide architecture and technical design. Act as the technical interface between software development, Product Management, and our customers. Guide architecture, engineering and integration decisions and timelines with dependency teams and evolve our architecture with quality, robustness and Amazon sized scale as top priorities.
- Make the right trade-offs. Understand the diverse perspectives of stakeholders and work with them to resolve differences. Ensure we ship software without compromising customer experience, usability, or business impact.
- Delight your customers. Internalize our customer challenges and identify opportunities for simplification and innovation to drive better outcomes for customers.
- Mentor. Grow and develop other TPMs across the organization.

About the team
Workforce Solutions (WS) empowers our customers by providing integrated, people-focused solutions that streamline hiring processes for WW Stores, AWS, Devices, and Talent Acquisition. As stewards of the employee lifecycle and experience, we drive initiatives that promote transparency and efficiency in career mobility, workforce engagement, and operational needs management. We prioritize customer-centricity by tailoring our capabilities and processes to align with their preferences and behaviors. Our approach is to start with the customer's needs and match individuals to the right opportunities through our services.

jobs.description:
Shape Amazon's future through our Workforce Solutions - Relocation team! As part of this dynamic organization, you'll be at the forefront of creating innovative relocation experiences and developing impactful, yet lightweight global solutions that are critical to Amazon's growth and customers. In this role, you'll immerse yourself in every facet of the relocation and assignment lifecycle. Your contributions will be integral to crafting robust relocation support and user-friendly products that empower Amazon to excel in attracting the world's top talent. We're seeking a self-driven professional with strong communication skills who can deliver high-quality results in our fast-paced environment.


Key job responsibilities
* Support customer inquiries by providing clear, accurate solutions while ensuring customer satisfaction
* Manage complex cases that require advanced policy interpretation, exceptions, and specialized problem-solving
* Oversee assignments from initiation through completion
* Serve as primary point of contact for assignees throughout their assignment lifecycle
* Communicate with business leaders on assignment questions, logistics, and policy matters
* Ideate, propose, and contribute to program enhancements and special projects and serve as subject matter expert for emerging program needs
* Design and implement high-impact solutions, strategies, and mechanisms that improve the employee and stakeholder experience
* Provide subject matter expertise and guidance to internal partners, fostering a culture of continuous learning and curiosity
* Develop communications and change management plans, and coordinate with cross-functional stakeholders on program initiatives

A day in the life
You will work closely with stakeholders and team leaders to define strategies, customer experiences, and continuous improvements for our program. This includes policies (eligibility, benefits, guardrails), vendor performance, contacts and escalations.

You will contribute to and lead initiatives to eliminate manual work and leverage automation and AI to deliver continuous improvement opportunities for our customers. Your ability to balance analytical thinking with practical execution will help drive improvements in our processes and deliver results for our customers.


About the team
Workforce Solutions (WS) empowers our customers by providing integrated, people-focused solutions that streamline hiring processes for WW Stores, AWS, Devices, and Talent Acquisition. As stewards of the employee lifecycle and experience, we drive initiatives that promote transparency and efficiency in career mobility, workforce engagement, and operational needs management. We prioritize customer-centricity by tailoring our capabilities and processes to align with their preferences and behaviors. Our approach is to start with the customer's needs and match individuals to the right opportunities through our services.

jobs.description:
We are looking for talented, driven and experienced individual for the Amazon fresh and Amazon Now program team in core consumables.
Amazon Now is Amazon's Quick Commerce program, while Amazon Fresh is Amazon's lead basket grocery program.
The program is highly cross functional in nature and requires a number of India first solutions to be created.
It is an important role that will contribute to success of the business by enabling management of critical workstreams through planning, reporting, and review mechanisms
Joining the team means partnering with a dynamic and creative group who set a high bar for innovation and success in a fast-paced and changing environment.

Key job responsibilities
- Manage various business critical workstreams
- Gain in-depth knowledge of how the business operates and effectively convert program objectives into plan
- Own and publish various key updates and reports
- Own deep dives and manage resolutions on key inputs associated with program areas such as Pricing and Selection
- Manage multiple stakeholders to support the execution of program plan

jobs.basic_qualifications:

- 5+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience

jobs.description:
Are you passionate about driving technological transformation through AI and automation? Join the Employee Onboarding Experience (EOE) team as a Technical Program Manager III delivering against our 2026 Service Delivery Automation and Efficiency initiative. This strategic program spans 20+ launches across three VP organizations and seven contingency domains, with AI and Agentic solutions one of the primary technical lever.

We are seeking a Technical Program Manager III to drive strategic transformation of Employee Onboarding Experience (EOE) Contingencies across Amazon's global workforce. This role orchestrates delivery across 3 VP organizations and 10+ tech teams to revolutionize service delivery through AI-powered automation and durable technical architecture.

In this position, you will own a program where business and architectural strategy may not be defined, bringing clarity to ambiguous situations and driving consensus across diverse stakeholders including Legal, Compliance, Finance, and senior technical leadership. You will shape the 3-year technical vision for contingency services spanning Work Authorization, Background Checks, Drug Testing, Medical Checks, Immigration, and Relocation—establishing reference architectures that enable Amazon to scale from 1.8M to 3M+ workers without proportional service team growth.

Key job responsibilities
- Define and execute the technical delivery strategy for organization-wide goals, creating scalable mechanisms and methodologies that drive Service Delivery Automation across multiple Vice President organizations
- Drive VP-level strategy for service delivery transformation, influencing investment priorities and resource allocation while making trade-offs between business opportunity and technical sustainability.
- Manage complex cross-functional programs by establishing clear business and technical requirements, defining delivery scope, timelines, and milestones while making appropriate trade-offs to optimize return-on-investment
- Build consensus and align teams toward coherent strategies, coordinating with business leaders, engineering teams, security and compliance, and product management to drive development progress
- Proactively identify risks, bottlenecks, and roadblocks across the program portfolio, initiating technical deep dives and organizing working sessions to solve problems and mitigate risks
- Communicate program status effectively to senior leadership, including writing compelling narratives and presenting complex decisions and trade-offs to directors and vice presidents

A day in the life
As a Senior Technical Program Manager in the team, you will work with multiple teams to help solve complex technical solutions aimed to build seamless journeys for candidates, hiring managers and recruiters. You will have a direct influence on the technical design and implementation plan. You will work with multiple tech and business teams to build these complex solutions.

About the team
Workforce Solutions (WS) empowers our customers by providing integrated, people-focused solutions that streamline hiring processes for WW Stores, AWS, Devices, and Talent Acquisition. As stewards of the employee lifecycle and experience, we drive initiatives that promote transparency and efficiency in career mobility, workforce engagement, and operational needs management. We prioritize customer-centricity by tailoring our capabilities and processes to align with their preferences and behaviors. Our approach is to start with the customer's needs and match individuals to the right opportunities through our services.

jobs.description:
As an Associate Program Manager, you will be expected to develop and own the long term program vision for India Subscribe & Save, program roadmap and come up new initiatives to scale the subscription business. You will partner closely with category business teams, partner tech team, tech team across IN and worldwide.

Key job responsibilities
1. Program Strategy and Direction: Continually assess the needs of customers, emerging market trends and competitive opportunities in defining and evolving the program strategy for India Subscribe & Save.
2. Roadmap Planning: Influence a cross-functional team for prioritizing and planning the roadmap and major launches. Use high judgement to make critical trade-offs, balancing both business requirements and technological trade-offs.
3. Selection & Selling Partner Success: Drive subscribable selection coverage, enhance customer value proposition, and drive initiatives that can scale the program primary inputs and create long-term success for selling partners.
4. Acquisition & Engagement: Scaling active subscribers and subscriptions in line with our 3Y vision.
5. Subscription Reliability & Business Operations: Driving a high bar on reliability and ensuring customer promise delivery is core to Subscribe & Save's success. This role will directly lead operations and fulfillment of automatic deliveries through Subscribe & Save.
jobs.description_short: As an Associate Program Manager, you will be expected to develop and own the long term program vision for India Subscribe & Save, program roadmap and come up new initiatives to scale the subscription business.

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- 7+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
- 5+ years of technical product or program management experience

jobs.description:
Are you passionate about driving technological transformation through AI and automation? Join the Employee Onboarding Experience (EOE) team as a Technical Program Manager III delivering against our 2026 Service Delivery Automation and Efficiency initiative. This strategic program spans 20+ launches across three VP organizations and seven contingency domains, with AI and Agentic solutions one of the primary technical lever.

We are seeking a Technical Program Manager III to drive strategic transformation of Employee Onboarding Experience (EOE) Contingencies across Amazon's global workforce. This role orchestrates delivery across 3 VP organizations and 10+ tech teams to revolutionize service delivery through AI-powered automation and durable technical architecture.

In this position, you will own a program where business and architectural strategy may not be defined, bringing clarity to ambiguous situations and driving consensus across diverse stakeholders including Legal, Compliance, Finance, and senior technical leadership. You will shape the 3-year technical vision for contingency services spanning Work Authorization, Background Checks, Drug Testing, Medical Checks, Immigration, and Relocation—establishing reference architectures that enable Amazon to scale from 1.8M to 3M+ workers without proportional service team growth.

Key job responsibilities
- Define and execute the technical delivery strategy for organization-wide goals, creating scalable mechanisms and methodologies that drive Service Delivery Automation across multiple Vice President organizations
- Drive VP-level strategy for service delivery transformation, influencing investment priorities and resource allocation while making trade-offs between business opportunity and technical sustainability.
- Manage complex cross-functional programs by establishing clear business and technical requirements, defining delivery scope, timelines, and milestones while making appropriate trade-offs to optimize return-on-investment
- Build consensus and align teams toward coherent strategies, coordinating with business leaders, engineering teams, security and compliance, and product management to drive development progress
- Proactively identify risks, bottlenecks, and roadblocks across the program portfolio, initiating technical deep dives and organizing working sessions to solve problems and mitigate risks
- Communicate program status effectively to senior leadership, including writing compelling narratives and presenting complex decisions and trade-offs to directors and vice presidents

A day in the life
As a Senior Technical Program Manager in the team, you will work with multiple teams to help solve complex technical solutions aimed to build seamless journeys for candidates, hiring managers and recruiters. You will have a direct influence on the technical design and implementation plan. You will work with multiple tech and business teams to build these complex solutions.

About the team
Workforce Solutions (WS) empowers our customers by providing integrated, people-focused solutions that streamline hiring processes for WW Stores, AWS, Devices, and Talent Acquisition. As stewards of the employee lifecycle and experience, we drive initiatives that promote transparency and efficiency in career mobility, workforce engagement, and operational needs management. We prioritize customer-centricity by tailoring our capabilities and processes to align with their preferences and behaviors. Our approach is to start with the customer's needs and match individuals to the right opportunities through our services.

jobs.description:
With millions of customers visiting us every day to find, discover, and buy products, we’re obsessed with making the shopping experience the best it can be – and advertising is a part of that experience. We strive to make advertising so relevant that customers welcome it – on Amazon, on mobile devices, and across the web. We put the customer at the heart of everything we do.
We are looking for a detail-oriented, analytical, and highly-motivated Ads sales expert to help scale our growing Advertising business. This person will be responsible for all aspects of Brand's advertising journey on Amazon Advertising including sales, on-boarding and launch of ad campaign by developing and leveraging strong relationships with agencies, tech partners, clients and internal teams.
To do this, this person needs to be extremely hands on and have a deep understanding of Amazon's advertising products, sales, operational capabilities, as well as the ability to synthesize analysis into a concise and compelling presentation.

Key job responsibilities
Deliver inputs, Ad products adoption and Ads revenue goals.
Build solid relationships with advertisers, advertising agencies, medium and small brands/ clients, displaying a dedication to delivering first-class service and online advertising solutions.
Identify media agencies and onboard to Amazon Ads network, educate brands on Amazon Advertising offering. Also help analyze campaign performance against key metrics to identify, recommend, and implement optimizations to help Medium/small brands to increase efficiency, drive high renewal rate and meet clients’ KPIs.
Troubleshoot any technical or implementation issues, collaborating with internal teams to develop quick and sound solutions.
Serve as a source of market intelligence for other areas of the Advertising team (e.g., product development, product marketing, pricing) and assist in the development of best practices and operational efficiencies.
